arguments.prompt:
Statistical analysis tool - Results Display (Step 4). Korean UI. Axiom Slate / Precision Editorial design system.

Horizontal stepper: All 4 steps complete. Step 4 (Results) ACTIVE with blue bar.

This is the final results page for an Independent Samples t-test analysis.

Main content layout (asymmetric bento grid):

Top Hero section (full width):
- Method name: Independent Samples t-test
- p-value badge: p = 0.003 (significant, highlighted in blue accent)
- Effect size badge: Cohen d = 0.82 (Large)
- One-line conclusion in Korean

Statistics cards row (4 columns):
- t-statistic: -3.142
- Degrees of freedom: 48
- Mean difference: -2.35
- 95% CI: [-3.87, -0.83]
Each card: label on top (small uppercase), large number below, tabular numerals.

AI Interpretation section (8-col):
A card with AI-generated Korean text explaining the result in plain language. Clean typography, generous padding.

Two-column bottom section:
Left (6-col): Box plot chart area showing two groups comparison
Right (6-col): Two stacked cards:
  1. Assumption Tests: Normality (Shapiro-Wilk p=0.234, passed), Equal Variance (Levene p=0.567, passed)
  2. Descriptive Statistics table: Group, N, Mean, SD, SE for each group

Bottom action bar (full width):
- Left: Back to Hub button
- Right: Export dropdown + Save Template + New Analysis button
